creator: eb30750@gmail.com
text:
The run levels 2 and 3 crash when I select them from the BSD boot selection screen.  Run levels 1 and 4 work fine.  The boot process stops at:  Time counters tick every 1.000 sec.

My hardware is an HP dv7-1130US laptop with an AMD Turion X2-70 cpu with ATI Radeon Graphics.

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: Select run level 2 or 3 before count time on boot select screens reaches zero.
